description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The front facade features a prominent entrance with a red door, a paved walkway, and a double garage with a tiled driveway. The roof is flat and expansive, with a clean, minimalist design. The backyard includes a small pool area shaded by palm trees and a patio space for outdoor relaxation. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials with dark trim accents, giving the house a contemporary urban appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped yard, double garage, and a backyard pool area. The exterior features light walls, dark trim, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, paved walkway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, side windows, and boundary wall with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, patio area, and palm trees, as well as rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional side windows, boundary wall, and landscaped greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
